level_signals: 4+ years of experience in consulting, banking, strategy, or business operations
Role involves cross-functional collaboration with sales, product, marketing, and operations
Startup experience in GTM operations strongly preferred

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in consulting, banking, strategy, or business operations. Startup experience in a similar GTM operations role, specifically SaaS pricing, sales, marketing, and operations strongly preferred.
Strong understanding of developing GTM operations using data-driven decision-making
Degree in Business Administration, Finance, or related field, or equivalent professional experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in partnerships, business development, and value engineering roles
Familiarity with AI or conversational AI technologies
Previous 0-1 startup or fast-paced high-growth environment experience

scope.surface: Pricing team — pricing proposals, ROI case studies, and overall pricing and packaging strategy
primary_metrics_inferred: ROI case study quality and impact on deals
core_responsibilities: Work with the sales team to develop and deliver pricing proposals and ROI case studies for customers
Collaborate with product, marketing, and operations teams to define overall pricing and packaging strategy

compensation.equity_form: Eligible full-time employees can participate in Sierra's equity plans subject to the terms of the applicable plans and policies

green_flags: High-profile co-founders (Bret Taylor, Clay Bavor) with strong credibility in tech
Equity participation offered to full-time employees
Encourages applicants whose experience doesn't precisely match the JD
Growing global company with multiple offices across AMER, EMEA, and APAC
Strong stated values framework including work-life balance ('Family')
red_flags: Primarily in-person in San Francisco — fully remote candidates not eligible
Role title 'Pricing Strategy and Operations' is somewhat generic and scope of team size is unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required and cross-functional scope)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description as B2B SaaS / AI platform)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'primarily an in-person company based in San Francisco')
ambiguities: The JD states 'Startup experience in a similar GTM operations role, specifically SaaS pricing, sales, marketing, and operations strongly preferred' — this reads as a strong preference (nice-to-have) but is embedded in the same bullet as the hard 4+ year requirement; classified the broader 4+ years as hard and the startup-specific qualifier as a note on the same requirement.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not mentioned anywhere in the JD; marked as 'unclear'.
No base salary or total comp range provided; equity is mentioned but no form specified beyond 'equity plans'.
